rationale: First option in the mutually exclusive transaction-type checkbox group ('X one box only'). Enum value 'entity_conversion'.

label_verbatim: Articles/Certificate of Merger or Share Exchange (13-C MRSA §1106, 31 MRSA §744, 31 MRSA §1436)
rationale: Second option. Enum value 'merger_or_share_exchange'.
Third option. Enum value 'inter_entity_consolidation'.
Fourth option. Enum value 'articles_or_certificate_of_conversion'.

label_verbatim: Articles of Conversion of Partnership (31 MRSA §1093)
rationale: Fifth option. Enum value 'conversion_of_partnership'.

label_verbatim: FIRST: The name of the limited partnership is
rationale: LP legal name; must contain 'Limited Partnership', 'L.P.', or 'LP' (or LLLP/PLLLP variants per 31 MRSA §1308.1.A). Same key as LP_MLPA-6.

label_verbatim: SECOND: The street and mailing address of the limited partnership's designated office shall be (physical location, street – not P.O. Box, city, state and zip code)
rationale: Single-line physical address of the designated office in Maine. Same key as LP_MLPA-6.
Optional mailing address of the designated office. Same key as LP_MLPA-6.
Mutually-exclusive option for 'commercial' registered agent. Same key family as MLPA-6, MLPA-12-1, CLKRA-3.
Maine SOS CRA Public Number, required when registered_agent.type='commercial'.
Name slot for commercial RA. Synth fills exactly one of Text5/Text6 based on registered_agent.type.
Mutually-exclusive option for 'noncommercial' registered agent.
Name slot for noncommercial RA. Alternative to Text5 — synth fills exactly one based on registered_agent.type.

label_verbatim: (physical location, not P.O. Box – street, city, state and zip code) [registered agent]
rationale: Single-line physical address of the registered agent in Maine. Same key as MLPA-6.

label_verbatim: (mailing address if different from above) [registered agent]
rationale: Optional mailing address of the registered agent.
Name of the first general partner. Same per-officer roster pattern as LP_MLPA-6.
Address of the first general partner.
Name of the second general partner.
Address of the second general partner.
Name of the third general partner.
Address of the third general partner.

label_verbatim: Names and addresses of additional general partners are attached as Exhibit ___ and made a part hereof
rationale: Boolean opt-in for an exhibit listing additional general partners (4+). Same key as MLPA-6, MLPA-12-1.
Inline exhibit letter for additional GPs.

label_verbatim: SIXTH: The limited partnership is a limited liability limited partnership
rationale: Boolean elect-in for LLLP status. If checked, the FIRST name must contain 'L.L.L.P.', 'LLLP', or 'Limited Liability Limited Partnership' per 31 MRSA §1308.1.A.3.

label_verbatim: SEVENTH: This is a professional limited liability limited partnership formed pursuant to 31 MRSA §1354.4
rationale: Boolean elect-in for professional LLLP/PLLLP status. Same key as MLPA-6 (note: aliased on MLPA-12-1 as entity.is_plllp).
Professional-services description line 1 (PLLLP only). Two-line widget primitive identical to MLPA-6 (Text16/Text17). Synth concatenates Text15+Text16 for the canonical value; either may be empty.
Professional-services description line 2. See Text15.

label_verbatim: EIGHTH: ...are set forth in the attached Exhibit ___ and made a part hereof
rationale: Inline exhibit letter for additional/subchapter-11 provisions. Small-width widget (rect ~33pt wide) consistent with a single-letter blank. Same key as MLPA-6 (Text18).
